testsuites.name: E-Commerce API Test Suite - Expert Level

testcase.name: [User] Each user should have required fields
[User] User email should be valid format
[User] Response time should be less than 2s
[User] Store first user ID for后续 tests
[User] Each post should belong to user
[User] Post should have title and body
[Product] Each post should have required fields
[Product] First post should have correct ID
[Cart] Each comment should have required fields
[Cart] Should filter by multiple post IDs
[Order] Each todo should have required fields
[Order] Should return todo with correct ID
[Negative] Should return empty object for non-existent user
[Negative] Should still create user (API accepts any)

testsuite.name: 07-Negative Tests / 03-Get User with Invalid ID Format
07-Negative Tests / 04-Create Post with Missing Required Fields

testcase.name: [Negative] Should create with defaults when required fields missing
[Negative] Should handle update of non-existent resource
[Negative] Should return success for non-existent delete
[Enhanced-004] User email should be valid format
[Enhanced-006] Should retrieve user or handle mock API limitation
[Enhanced-012] Response should contain all updated fields
[Enhanced-015] Data should be consistent after update
[Enhanced-020] Each result should have required fields
